name: tripassist
description: TripAssist — static demo showcase (story landing page + operator dashboard) → GitHub Pages. The functional MVP lives on the `mvp` branch.
comment: This root package is a pnpm workspace MANAGER only — the shipped apps live in apps/*. Scripts call `node node_modules/<pkg>/...` directly, never npx/pnpm-exec, because the repo path can contain a ':' that corrupts the .bin PATH shim. `pnpm -r <script>` fans a script out to every workspace member (never the root itself).
